name: Curtail solar to 50%, verify readback, then release
hypothesis: A grid-service head-end commands an active-power limit and must be able to confirm the DER actually APPLIED it, not merely accepted the write (Modbus success = accepted into the pipeline; application truth is the 704 echo).
expected: The gateway echoes the commanded WMaxLimPct back through its 704 projection; the emulator's readback converges to 50% then back to 100% within the SLA.
fix: If a readback never converges, the write was accepted but not applied: look at lexa-mode's %->W conversion (nameplate provenance, ruling C15) and the lexa-modbus reconciler.
notes: Runs hermetically against the loopback authz server (a solar inverter on unit 2) AND live against lexa-gw :802. The hold is deliberately short for CI/demo; lengthen sleep_s for a real 10-minute soak.
